creator: root@hclb.demon.co.uk
text:
The enclosed GENERICAH file makes config dump core after displaying
	a syntax error. 
	The syntax error may be correct or even a new feature. Dumping 
	core on a syntax error probably isn't.
	I have added an extra root drive sd1.  freebsd-1.0 
	would let me set up a kernel for multiple root drives.

Fix: 

Only use one root drive for the time being.
How-To-Repeat: 	Decode the enclosed file.
	$ cd /usr/src/sys/i386/conf
	$ config GENERICAHcoredump
